demo_timestamps.description: Discussion and implementation of AnkaDB as a central point for BIM data aggregation and automation
Technical demonstration of AnkaDB validating data and using predefined rules for estimating costs and LCA
Workflow demonstration for setting exposure class of concrete using anchor DB.
Life cost and LCA estimates demonstration using a catalog for cost positions.
Urban mining design option comparison using data-driven approach.

themes: Scaling digital workflows in architecture and construction
Automated cost estimation and sustainability analysis
Role of humans in AI-driven workflows

client_mentions.name: Dresden Sommer
client_mentions.context: A company focused on scaling digital workflows across EPCM projects

summary: The video outlines how Dresden Sommer utilizes AnkaDB to automate BIM data processing and improve workflow integration, centralizing data across projects with validation and estimation features. It also explores building an AI-ready BIM data foundation using Autodesk ACC and APS, detailing workflows for managing concrete exposure classes and conducting cost and LCA estimates, while underscoring the importance of human involvement and data trust in scaling automation and successful decision-making.
